en: But, um, if that is our competition,
ko: 파란색을 설명할 수 있지만, 만약 그게 우리의 경쟁이라면,

en: we have our work cut out for us, so to speak.
ko: 우리는 할 일이 많습니다, 그렇게 말할 수 있죠.

en: You don't have any competition, Gail. Not as far as I'm concerned.
After all, how pure can pure be?
ko: 결국, 순수함이 얼마나 순수할 수 있을까요?

en: It can be pretty darn pure.
Mr. Fring, I can guarantee you a purity of 96%.
ko: 프링 씨, 96%의 순도를 보장할 수 있습니다.

en: I'm proud of that figure. It's a hard-earned figure, 96%.
Maybe even a touch beyond that.
I'd need an instrument called a gas chromatograph to say for sure.
ko: 확실히 말하려면 가스 크로마토그래프라는 기기가 필요합니다.

en: But, um, that last 3%, it may not sound like a lot,
Gail, for our purposes, 96% will do just fine.
